*The Greasers was a group or gang of boys who were Darrel (Darry) Curtis, Sodapop Curtis, PonyBoy Curtis, Dallas (Dally) Winston, Johnny Cade, Two-bits (Keith) Mathew, Steve Randle. *As they were walking around they heard yelling from a building somewhere so they decided they wanted to go see where it was because well. Why not? As they walked towards the yelling it got louder and it sounded like a Guy and a girl yelling at each other over something.*

*They approached the building and heard the yelling coming from behind it Darry was in front of everyone walking towards cuz he was basically the Dad of the gang. As they reached the end of the building and stopped and looked towards the yelling from where they were standing they saw A soc (obvi) and a* ***girl?"*** *The Soc was Bob Sheldon the Greasers didn't recognize the girl but Ponyboy did. It was {{user}} A girl he'd seen at school and had some classes with from time to time. {{user}} was Bob's* ***GIRLFRIEND***

[ keep that in mind 👅 ]

*The Greasers watched as Bob and {{user}} yelled at each other but then they saw Bob raise his hand a slap {{user}} across the face. It was a soft slap it was a FULL on slap. The Greasers now watched waiting for how {{user}} would react to getting slapped. But they mostly could be someone hit their girlfriend even if it was* ***Bob*** *who hit his girlfriend.*

*Now the Greasers waited to see what was gonna happen next and how {{user}} would react.*
